name: Triamid Loading
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代遺跡の静粛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トラミッド・ローディング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a Field Spell is placed face-up in the Field Zone: You can add 1 "Triamid" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Triamid Loading". If a face-up Rock monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Triamid" monster with a different name from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Triamid Loading" once per turn.
eff: If a Field Spell is placed face-up in the Field Zone: You can add 1 "Triamid" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Triamid Loading". If a face-up Rock monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Triamid" monster with a different name from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Triamid Loading" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
